name: Step And Slash
author: Poki
description: Step And Slash is colorful and fast-paced action game where the player climbs up a long flight of stairs and slays pointy creatures on the way. Hack, slash, and step your way to the very top, and even beat your own highscore while you’re at it! Can you survive until the end? How to play Step And Slash? Press W, the Arrow Up key, Spacebar, or click with your mouse to take a step forward. Choose the right moment to slash or avoid the monsters coming your way. Who created Step And Slash? Step And Slash is created by Delfino. Play their other games on Poki: Moving Blocks ! How can I play Step And Slash for free? You can play Step And Slash for free on Poki. Can I play Step And Slash on mobile devices and desktop? Step And Slash can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
